value.positioning_statement: Competitive intelligence suite that levels the playing field for SMBs, making CI accessible beyond enterprises, with a strong focus on the SaaS niche at a reasonable price.
value.value_proposition: Actionable frameworks, practitioner strategies, and independent tool reviews for CI professionals who want to track competitors, win more deals, and make smarter decisions.
value.launch_style: Beta launch May 15, 2024 with early-adopter offer (1 year free + 50% lifetime discount for feedback)

positioning.method: Homepage hero + launch blog post. Note: current homepage primarily presents a CI content/blog hub

value.release_cadence: weekly blog content ('in-depth CI guides every week')
